Author: Sansflaire
Name: FFXIV-TV
Punchline: Render a live video screen anywhere in the game world.
Description:
Places a virtual screen in 3D world space that displays images and video with proper depth testing. Supports local files, direct URLs, YouTube (via yt-dlp), and multi-player sync so all players with the plugin see the same content simultaneously.

Note: yt-dlp.exe must be placed in the plugin folder for YouTube support (host only — sync clients receive a direct stream URL automatically).
